items.title: NYC nursing walkout ends as last striking nurses approve new contract
items.description: Thousands of nurses at a major New York hospital system have approved a new contract, voting to end a strike after more than a month

items.title: Brazil and India agree to boost cooperation on rare earths
items.description: Brazil and India have signed a new deal to cooperate on rare earths and other critical minerals

items.title: Saudi Arabia may have uranium enrichment under proposed deal with US, arms control experts warn
items.description: Saudi Arabia could have some form of uranium enrichment within the kingdom under a proposed nuclear deal with the United States
